note: Hodlnaut tied its financial distress to TerraUSD crash losses and other liquidity pressures.
Unusually high withdrawal volumes were cited as part of the platform stress.
Withdrawals token swaps and deposits were halted together.
Customer outcomes moved into a judicial-management recovery process.
Hodlnaut had earlier restricted LUNA and UST handling after Terra ecosystem volatility.
Reports described roughly 190 million dollars of Terra-related loss exposure.
